detect.predict.instructions: Decide whether the supplied passage was generated by an AI.

demos.text: In PyTorch, we rely on reverse-mode automatic differentiation, so you can alter a network’s behavior however you like without added lag or overhead. The approach draws inspiration from several research papers and from both earlier and ongoing projects, including torch-autograd, autograd, and Chainer.

Modern web applications employ meaningful URLs for users’ benefit. When an address is clear and memorable, visitors are more apt to favor the page, return anon, and use that same URL to reach it directly with little fuss.

This special Operator skips all tasks downstream of itself if you are not on the "latest" DAG run (if the wall-clock time right now is between its execution_time and the next scheduled execution_time, and it was not an externally-triggered run).

This peculiar Operator bypasses every downstream task unless it belongs to the “latest” DAG run; that is, wall-clock time must fall between its execution_time and the next scheduled execution_time, and the run must not have been triggered externally.
